items.title: Haegue Yang’s Meditations on Exile
items.summary: Also, the controversy around an AI-altered version of an Ansel Adams photo.

items.title: Ansel Adams Trust Decries Dealer's Sale of Photo Colorized Using AI
items.summary: The trust said gallerist James Danziger's AI-altered editions, offered at an art fair, “exploited Ansel’s name, reputation, and his most iconic image."

items.title: The Private Worlds of Charlotte Brontë and Octavia E. Butler
items.summary: Behind The Huntington Library’s glass cases, the layers of motherhood, career, friendship, family, and loss are revealed in personal objects.

items.title: Haegue Yang’s Constellations for a Divided Korea
items.summary: The artist’s play on light and shadow transforms Venetian blinds into haunting reflections on exile, borders, and the longing for reunification.
